messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: The cost-health sidecar's resourceAnomalies field is always empty — nothing samples resources headless
What it solves: THE DEFECT, AND WHY IT IS THE NASTIEST ONE IN THE AUDIT. The cost-health sidecar (BL-272) is
emitted headless every single day and looks perfectly healthy. Its `resourceAnomalies` field is
present in the schema, emitted daily — and ALWAYS EMPTY. The container looks fixed; one of its
own fields is s…
How it works: Resource samples are recorded with no editor attached
